TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Zayazayan Itiniay i Majia Cen no Pingtung ko Zayazayan a niyaro', 233 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 793 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 97% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 768 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 3% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 25 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan89%, Rukai3%, Tayal1%, Amis1%, Bunun1%, roma2%.
S.PHON: *aja*ajan itiniaj i majia ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u *aja*ajan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan**%, ro~u~ukai*%, tajaɾ*%, amis*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%.
S.FORM: Zayazayan Itiniay i Majia Cen no Pingtung ko Zayazayan a niyaro', 233 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 793 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 97% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 768 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 3% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 25 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan89%, Rukai3%, Tayal1%, Amis1%, Bunun1%, roma2%.
S.PHON: *aja*ajan itiniaj i majia ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u *aja*ajan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan**%, ro~u~ukai*%, tajaɾ*%, amis*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%.
